opinion.h: SYNANON FOUNDATION, INC. v. CALIFORNIA, 365 U.S. 300 (1961)
SYNANON FOUNDATION, INC., ET AL. v. CALIFORNIA. APPEAL FROM THE APPELLATE DEPARTMENT OF THE SUPERIOR COURT OF CALIFORNIA, COUNTY OF LOS ANGELES. No. 607. Decided February 20, 1961.
opinion.p: Appeal dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
365 U.S. 300 BROOKS v. SOUTH CAROLINA. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF SOUTH CAROLINA. No. 610, Misc. Decided February 20, 1961.
The appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
